title: Easy Cabbage Soup with Dill (Polish Summer Kapusniak) — with Added Spices

vegetables: 1 medium carrot, peeled and cut into slices or cubes
4 medium yellow potatoes, peeled and cubed

steps: In a large pot or Dutch oven, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions, leeks, and crushed garlic. Cook for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until soft and translucent.
Add the chopped carrots, celery, sweet paprika, and any optional spices (cumin, turmeric, Italian seasoning). Cook for another 3 minutes.
Add the cubed potatoes and chopped cabbage, then pour over the broth.
Cover the soup and cook for about 20–25 minutes, until all the vegetables are cooked through.
Check for seasoning. Add black pepper, celery salt, and additional salt to taste.
Add the chopped dill and mix well.
